emails.subject: PROGRAM ENROLLMENT — MANDATORY READ
emails.body:
WEYLAND-YUTANI CORP
BIOPET DIVISION — INTERACTIVE TRAINING TOOL

WELCOME, EMPLOYEE.

You have been selected for the BIOPET
Division. This is a positive outcome.

Selection criteria included your
dedication, work ethic, and
{RANDOMIZED PERFORMANCE TRAIT#3}.

You will oversee the development of a
company biopet through feeding,
training, and guided interaction.

With proper care, your specimen may
reach full maturity.

With improper care, your specimen may
still reach full maturity.

Both outcomes are useful.
